description.selection:
# Vite React Cloudflare

Use this general-purpose stack for interactive applications, dashboards, tools,
and products that benefit from a client-rendered React UI plus Cloudflare Worker
routes or Durable Object persistence.

Built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui configuration, Hono, and one
Cloudflare Durable Object. Prefer `next-cf` when server rendering or SEO is a
primary requirement.
description.usage:
# Usage

- Replace `src/App.tsx` with the product UI and extend semantic tokens in
  `src/index.css` and `tailwind.config.js`.
- `src/components/ui/button.tsx` is the only preinstalled shadcn primitive.
  `components.json` is configured for on-demand additions; install other
  primitives with `bunx shadcn@latest add <component>` before importing them.
- Add HTTP endpoints in `worker/userRoutes.ts`. Keep the Worker entrypoint intact.
- Add stateful methods to `worker/durableObject.ts`; the single
  `GlobalDurableObject` binding and migration are already configured.
- Call Worker APIs from the frontend with relative `/api/*` URLs.
- Add only the dependencies and routing library the generated product needs.

description.selection:
# Next.js Cloudflare

Use this stack when server rendering, metadata, search visibility, or Next.js
Pages Router conventions materially benefit the product. It is configured for
Cloudflare deployment through OpenNext.

Prefer `vite-react-cf` for lightweight client-heavy applications or products
that need the preconfigured Durable Object backend.
description.usage:
# Usage

- Build pages in `src/pages/` and keep global semantic tokens in
  `src/styles/globals.css` and `tailwind.config.js`.
- `src/components/ui/button.tsx` is the only preinstalled shadcn primitive.
  `components.json` is configured for on-demand additions; install other
  primitives with `bunx shadcn@latest add <component>` before importing them.
- Add Pages Router API handlers under `src/pages/api/` only when needed.
- Keep `next.config.mjs`, `open-next.config.ts`, and `wrangler.jsonc` compatible
  with the OpenNext Cloudflare build.
- Add only dependencies used by the generated product.
